subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant! Praise be unto God, thou wearest a resplendent crown upon thy head and art arrayed in a luminous mantle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست صهبای میثاق الحمد لله تاجی وهاج بر سر داری و رداای نوراء در بر و آن
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
